## Meeting Purpose

[Clarify the new article publishing process and unblock content.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Publishing Path:** Articles now go to the `Guides` CMS collection in Webflow (`prophecy.ai`), not the old `Blog`.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [**Flexible Publishing:** The site update enables publishing individual articles without a full site deploy, allowing for faster, more frequent releases.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [**Approval Bottleneck:** Raj's review is the current blocker. Cody will consolidate articles for Raj to review this week, then propose a more scalable process to Will.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:** Production continues with 9 articles ready for review, 2 in progress, and 5 approved for writing.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)

## Topics

### Approval Bottleneck

  - [**Problem:** Raj's review is the current bottleneck for publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [**Context:** Raj is traveling, causing delays.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [**Solution:** Cody will consolidate articles for Raj to review this week.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [**Goal:** Use Raj's feedback on the first few articles to refine the process and enable Cody to act as a more effective editor.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
  - [**Future State:** Cody will propose a more scalable approval process to Will, potentially reducing Raj's review load to increase publishing velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)

### Publishing Process

  - [**Access:** The `teams@growthxlabs.com` account should have Webflow access.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [**Path:** `prophecy.ai` site → `CMS` → `Guides` collection.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [**Workflow:** GrowthX stages articles → Cody approves → Cody publishes.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [**Categories:** Select the closest available option; Cody will edit them later.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [**Image Automation:** GrowthX's new tool generates multiple images per article for selection, streamlining the visual asset process.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)

### Content Pipeline

  - [**Ready for Review:** 9 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [**In Production:** 2 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [**Approved for Writing:** 5 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [**Topic Creation:** GrowthX will continue adding new topics for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [**Feedback:** Cody's initial reviews are positive, with only minor contextual edits needed.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
      - [Stage the 9 ready articles in the `Guides` CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
      - [Report any Webflow credential issues to Cody.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
      - [Continue content production and topic creation.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [**Cody:**](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [Consolidate articles for Raj's review this week.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
      - [Propose a scalable approval process to Will.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
      - [Publish the first article once approved to activate the `Guides` page.](https://fathom.video/share/WrhxgXVP3ffzqDB8HZ6rxA8J-zybqNB_?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
